2605.13779.title: MinT: Managed Infrastructure for Training and Serving Millions of LLMs
2605.13779.paper_summary: We present MindLab Toolkit (MinT), a managed infrastructure system for Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) post-training and online serving. MinT targets a setting where many trained policies are produced over a small number of expensive base-model deployments. Instead of materializing each policy as a merged full checkpoint, MinT keeps the base model resident and moves exported LoRA adapter revisions through rollout, update, export, evaluation, serving, and rollback, hiding distributed training, serving, scheduling, and data movement behind a service interface. MinT scales this path along three axes. Scale Up extends LoRA RL to frontier-scale dense and MoE architectures, including MLA and DSA attention paths, with training and serving validated beyond 1T total parameters. Scale Down moves only the exported LoRA adapter, which can be under 1% of base-model size in rank-1 settings; adapter-only handoff reduces the measured step by 18.3x on a 4B dense model and 2.85x on a 30B MoE, while concurrent multi-policy GRPO shortens wall time by 1.77x and 1.45x without raising peak memory. Scale Out separates durable policy addressability from CPU/GPU working sets: a tensor-parallel deployment supports 10^6-scale addressable catalogs (measured single-engine sweeps through 100K) and thousand-adapter active waves at cluster scale, with cold loading treated as scheduled service work and packed MoE LoRA tensors improving live engine loading by 8.5-8.7x. MinT thus manages million-scale LoRA policy catalogs while training and serving selected adapter revisions over shared 1T-class base models.
2605.13779.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 MindLab Toolkit (MinT)，這是一個用於低秩適應 (LoRA) 後訓練和在線服務的管理基礎設施系統。<lb/>MinT 的目標是在少量昂貴的基礎模型部署上產生許多訓練政策的環境。<lb/>MinT 並不將每個政策實現為合併的完整檢查點，而是保持基礎模型的常駐，並通過推出、更新、導出、評估、服務和回滾來移動導出的 LoRA 適配器修訂，將分佈式訓練、服務、排程和數據移動隱藏在服務接口後面。<lb/>MinT 沿著三個軸擴展這一路徑。<lb/>Scale Up 將 LoRA 強化學習擴展到前沿規模的稠密和 MoE 架構，包括 MLA 和 DSA 注意力路徑，訓練和服務的驗證超過 1T 總參數。<lb/>Scale Down 僅移動導出的 LoRA 適配器，這在秩為 1 的設置中可能小於基礎模型大小的 1%；僅適配器的交接在一個 4B 稠密模型上將測量步驟減少了 18.3 倍，在一個 30B MoE 上減少了 2.85 倍，而同時進行的多政策 GRPO 將牆面時間縮短了 1.77 倍和 1.45 倍，且不增加峰值內存。<lb/>Scale Out 將持久政策可尋址性與 CPU/GPU 工作集分開：一個張量並行部署支持 10^6 規模的可尋址目錄（通過 100K 的單引擎掃描進行測量）和千個適配器的活躍波在集群規模上，冷加載被視為計劃的服務工作，打包的 MoE LoRA 張量將實時引擎加載提高了 8.5-8.7 倍。<lb/>因此，MinT 在訓練和服務選定的適配器修訂時，管理百萬規模的 LoRA 政策目錄，並共享 1T 級的基礎模型。
